SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class AuxiliaryContract.Variables

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.AuxiliaryContract.Variables
Enclosing interface:
AuxiliaryContract
public static class AuxiliaryContract.Variables extends Object
This class contains all new variables that are introduced during a AuxiliaryContract's instantiation.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final Map<Label,LocationVariable>
    breakFlags
    Boolean flags that are set to true when the block terminates by a break label; statement with the specified label.
    final Map<Label,LocationVariable>
    continueFlags
    Boolean flags that are set to true when the block terminates by a continue label; statement with the specified label.
    final LocationVariable
    exception
    Exception variable to set when the block terminates by an uncaught throw statement.
    final Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable>
    outerRemembranceHeaps
    A map from every heap heap that is accessible inside the block to heap_Before_METHOD.
    final Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable>
    outerRemembranceVariables
    A map from every variable var that is accessible inside the block to var_Before_METHOD.
    final Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable>
    remembranceHeaps
    A map from every heap heap to heap_Before_BLOCK.
    final Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable>
    remembranceLocalVariables
    A map from every variable var that is modifiable inside the block to var_Before_BLOCK.
    final LocationVariable
    result
    Result variable to set when the block terminates by a return statement.
    final LocationVariable
    returnFlag
    Boolean flag that is set to true when the block terminates by a return statement.
    final LocationVariable
    self
    self

    • self

      public final LocationVariable self
      self

    • breakFlags

      public final Map<Label,LocationVariable> breakFlags
      Boolean flags that are set to true when the block terminates by a break label; statement with the specified label.

    • continueFlags

      public final Map<Label,LocationVariable> continueFlags
      Boolean flags that are set to true when the block terminates by a continue label; statement with the specified label.

    • returnFlag

      public final LocationVariable returnFlag
      Boolean flag that is set to true when the block terminates by a return statement.

    • result

      public final LocationVariable result
      Result variable to set when the block terminates by a return statement.

    • exception

      public final LocationVariable exception
      Exception variable to set when the block terminates by an uncaught throw statement.

    • remembranceHeaps

      public final Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> remembranceHeaps
      A map from every heap heap to heap_Before_BLOCK.

    • remembranceLocalVariables

      public final Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> remembranceLocalVariables
      A map from every variable var that is modifiable inside the block to var_Before_BLOCK.

    • outerRemembranceHeaps

      public final Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> outerRemembranceHeaps
      A map from every heap heap that is accessible inside the block to heap_Before_METHOD.

    • outerRemembranceVariables

      public final Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> outerRemembranceVariables
      A map from every variable var that is accessible inside the block to var_Before_METHOD.

  • Constructor Details

    • Variables

      public Variables(LocationVariable self, Map<Label,LocationVariable> breakFlags, Map<Label,LocationVariable> continueFlags, LocationVariable returnFlag, LocationVariable result, LocationVariable exception, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> remembranceHeaps, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> remembranceLocalVariables, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> outerRemembranceHeaps, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> outerRemembranceVariables, TermServices services)
      creates an auxiliary contract You should use the suitable `create` method instead of this constructor.
      Parameters:
      self - self
      breakFlags - boolean flags that are set to true when the block terminates by a break label; statement with the specified label.
      continueFlags - boolean flags that are set to true when the block terminates by a continue label; statement with the specified label.
      returnFlag - boolean flag that is set to true when the block terminates by a return statement.
      result - result variable to set when the block terminates by a return statement.
      exception - exception variable to set when the block terminates by an uncaught throw statement.
      remembranceHeaps - a map from every heap heap to heap_Before_BLOCK.
      remembranceLocalVariables - a map from every variable var that is modifiable inside the block to var_Before_BLOCK.
      outerRemembranceHeaps - a map from every heap heap that is accessible inside the block to heap_Before_METHOD.
      outerRemembranceVariables - a map from every variable var that is accessible inside the block to var_Before_METHOD.
      services - services.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static AuxiliaryContract.Variables create(StatementBlock block, List<Label> labels, IProgramMethod method, Services services)
      Creates a new instance.
      Parameters:
      block - the block for which this instance is created.
      labels - all labels that belong to the block.
      method - the method containing the block.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a new instance.

    • create

      public static AuxiliaryContract.Variables create(LoopStatement loop, List<Label> labels, IProgramMethod method, Services services)
      Creates a new instance.
      Parameters:
      loop - the loop for which this instance is created.
      labels - all labels that belong to the block.
      method - the method containing the block.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a new instance.

    • combineRemembranceVariables

      public Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> combineRemembranceVariables()
      Returns:
      the union of remembranceHeaps and remembranceLocalVariables.

    • combineOuterRemembranceVariables

      public Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> combineOuterRemembranceVariables()
      Returns:
      the union of outerRemembranceHeaps and outerRemembranceVariables.

    • termify

      public AuxiliaryContract.Terms termify(JTerm self)
      Parameters:
      self - the self term to use.
      Returns:
      a Terms object containing these variables in term form.
